summary: Live PR inventory shard classified independently. Four PRs (#92975, #93439, #46303, #93543) are routed to central OpenClaw security handling because deterministic validation marked them security-sensitive. The remaining six open PRs stay open for normal maintainer/technical review. No shared canonical was selected, and no close, merge, fix, or raise-PR actions are safe or permitted by this job.
